creator: simon@allstor-sw.co.uk
text:
Gents,
 
 we have been experiencing these panics (all of them) through our release testing
 of a RAID system.
 
 panic :ffs_alloccg : map corrupted
 panic :ffs_blkfree: freeing free frag
 
 adaptec 3940 U/W controller
 RAB 3600 RAID controller
 Celeron +TMC + DIMMS and AMD K6 + ARBOR + SIMMS motherboards
 FreeBSD3.0 and 4.1
 
 3.0 just freezes or reboots and 4.1 throws up the above messages.
 
 3.0 fails with SCSI drives and RAID controller
 4.1 works with SCSI drives and fails with RAID controller
 
 all systems also contain ATA drives no failures on those recorded
 
 deleting 7GB of 1k files causes these failures within 5 minutes repeatably.  We
 have 8 systems failing every
 5-10 minutes for 6 weeks now.
